name: Gun Outlet & Pawn
description_short: Gun Outlet & Pawn is a firearms retailer and pawn shop in Charlotte, NC offering FFL transfers, gun sales, pawning services, and extensive shooting accessories.
description_long:
Gun Outlet & Pawn operates as a brick-and-mortar firearms retailer and pawn shop located at 5115 N Tryon St in Charlotte, North Carolina. The business combines traditional pawn shop services with specialized gun retail, serving the local shooting community and collectors. The company maintains a physical storefront open Monday-Friday 10 AM-6 PM, Saturday 11 AM-5 PM, with online e-commerce capabilities through their website gunoutletnc.com.

The company offers three primary service lines: FFL transfer services for $50 per transaction, gun pawning services, and retail sales of firearms and shooting-related products. Their retail inventory spans handguns (semi-automatic, revolvers, bolt action, derringers), rifles (bolt action, lever action, pump action, semi-automatic), shotguns (over-under, side-by-side, pump action), ammunition across calibers, optics (scopes, red dots, night vision, thermal), holsters, magazines, gun storage (safes, cases, locks), cleaning equipment, gunsmithing parts, reloading supplies, and tactical accessories. Featured products visible include models from Sig Sauer, Ruger, Smith & Wesson, Citadel, Century Arms, and Radical Firearms at price points ranging from $348.99 to $899.99.

What distinguishes Gun Outlet & Pawn is their combination of retail and pawn services under one roof—allowing customers to buy, sell, or pawn firearms directly. The company clearly caters to serious shooters and gun enthusiasts with comprehensive categories including gunsmithing parts, reloading supplies, optics, and specialized accessories. Their e-commerce platform with warehouse fulfillment indicates infrastructure for both local and remote customers. The $50 FFL transfer fee is transparently advertised as a core service.

As a pawn shop and firearms retailer, Gun Outlet & Pawn is subject to federal firearms licensing requirements and state regulations. Their primary function is retail gun sales and pawn lending (collateral-based loans), not consumer finance for general expenses. They do not offer the traditional personal loans, debt solutions, or credit services typically associated with consumer finance platforms. This is appropriately categorized as a pawn shop that specializes in firearms rather than a general consumer lending operation.
pros: Transparent FFL transfer pricing at $50 per transfer clearly displayed on homepage
Combined retail and pawn services allow customers to buy, sell, or pawn firearms in one location
Extensive inventory of firearms across multiple categories and price points ($348-$899 range visible)
Comprehensive selection of shooting accessories including optics, ammunition, reloading supplies, and gunsmithing parts
Established physical location in Charlotte with consistent business hours and contact information
Online e-commerce platform with warehouse fulfillment capability for remote customers
Specialized knowledge base evident through detailed product categorization (e.g., optics types, reloading supplies)
cons: As a pawn shop, collateral-based lending terms and rates are not disclosed on website—borrowers must contact in person
Limited to firearms and shooting-related products; cannot serve general pawn or collateral loan needs outside this niche
No information about pawn loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, or lending policies available online
Subject to federal and state firearms regulations which may limit accessibility for some consumers
Physical location in Charlotte limits in-person accessibility for customers outside the area; primarily serves local market
best_for: Firearms owners and shooting enthusiasts seeking to buy, sell, or pawn guns locally in Charlotte
Gun collectors and competitive shooters needing specialized accessories, optics, and gunsmithing parts
FFL transfer customers needing licensed firearms transfers at transparent fixed pricing
Individuals needing fast collateral-based loans secured by firearms or other valuables
diagnosis: Gun Outlet & Pawn is best for firearms owners and shooting enthusiasts in the Charlotte area seeking to buy, sell, or pawn guns, or who need FFL transfer services at transparent pricing. The primary caveat is that this is a specialized pawn shop focused exclusively on firearms—not a general consumer lending platform—and pawn loan terms, rates, and policies are not disclosed online and require in-person consultation.
services: Handgun retail sales (semi-automatic, revolvers, derringers, bolt action)
Rifle retail sales (bolt action, lever action, pump action, semi-automatic)
Shotgun retail sales (over-under, side-by-side, pump action, lever action)
Ammunition sales (handgun, rifle, rimfire, shotgun ammo)
Optics and sighting equipment sales (scopes, red dots, night vision, thermal optics, rangefinders)
Gun storage solutions (safes, hard cases, soft cases, locks, security accessories)
Gunsmithing parts and tools (barrels, triggers, rails, handguards, grips)
Reloading supplies (ammunition boxes, cases, presses, dies, projectiles)
